issue_summary: Improve support for selecting methods with parameters
javadoc_before:
/** * Load a method by its fully qualified name. *

The supported format is {@code [fully qualified class name]#[methodName]}. * For example, the fully qualified name for the {@code chars()} method in * {@code java.lang.String} is {@code java.lang.String#chars}. * @param fullyQualifiedMethodName the fully qualified name of the method to load; * never {@code null} or blank * @return Optional of Method */
javadoc_after:
/** * Load a method by its fully qualified name. * *

The following formats are supported. * *

    *
  • {@code [fully qualified class name]#[methodName]}
    • *
  • {@code [fully qualified class name]#[methodName](parameter type list)} *
    • The parameter type list is a comma-separated list of * fully qualified class names for the types of parameters accepted by * the method.
    *
    • *
* *

Examples

* * * * * * * *
MethodFully Qualified Method Name
{@link String#chars()}{@code java.lang.String#chars}
{@link String#chars()}{@code java.lang.String#chars()}
{@link String#equalsIgnoreCase(String)}{@code java.lang.String#equalsIgnoreCase(java.lang.String)}
{@link String#substring(int, int)}{@code java.lang.String#substring(int, int)}
* * @param fullyQualifiedMethodName the fully qualified name of the method to load; * never {@code null} or blank * @return an {@code Optional} containing the method; never {@code null} but * potentially empty */
